# so101-biolab-automation

> Dual SO-101 robotic arm bio-lab automation: 96-well pipetting, tool changing, remote oversight.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/README.md)
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Architecture](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/docs/architecture.md)
- [User Stories](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/docs/UserStory.md)
- [Demo Scenarios](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/docs/demo-scenarios.md)
- [Hardware BOM](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/docs/hardware/BOM.md)
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

## Source

- [so101/arms.py](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/app/so101/arms.py): Dual SO-101 arm controller (LeRobot wrapper)
- [so101/pipette.py](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/app/so101/pipette.py): Digital pipette serial control
- [so101/plate.py](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/app/so101/plate.py): 96-well coordinate grid (SBS standard)
- [so101/tool_changer.py](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/app/so101/tool_changer.py): Autonomous tool changing
- [so101/camera.py](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/app/so101/camera.py): Multi-camera pipeline
- [so101/safety.py](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/app/so101/safety.py): E-stop, watchdog, joint limits
- [dashboard/server.py](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/app/dashboard/server.py): FastAPI remote oversight

## Configuration

- [configs/arms.yaml](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/configs/arms.yaml): Arm port mappings and motor IDs
- [configs/plate_layout.yaml](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/configs/plate_layout.yaml): Well coordinates and heights
- [configs/tool_dock.yaml](https://github.com/qte77/so101-biolab-automation/blob/main/configs/tool_dock.yaml): Tool dock station positions
